name: What evidence do I need for work back injury claim in Boise Idaho?
description: Medical link to work, report, witnesses—get doctor opinion.

mainEntity.name: What evidence do I need for work back injury claim in Boise Idaho?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical link to work, report, witnesses—get doctor opinion.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Incident report, medical records linking to work, witness statements.**

Idaho requires proof of work causation; photos, supervisor notes strengthen.[2]

- Doctor narrative on mechanism.
- Wage stubs for lost pay.
- Timeline of events.

Attorney compiles for filing; weak evidence risks denial.[2] Start documenting.
